# Aniwa | Digital Strategy & Development Agency

> Digital marketing and software development agency with over 10 years of experience based in Chihuahua, México. Specialized in helping businesses grow through comprehensive digital strategies, high-performance web development, and branding.

## Core Capabilities
- **Web & App Development:** Modern, responsive websites and custom applications (mobile/web) optimized for conversion and performance.
- **Digital Marketing:** Strategic Social Media management and SEO (Organic search engine positioning).
- **Branding:** Professional visual identity design and brand positioning.

## Site Structure (Bilingual)

### English (Primary)
- [Home](https://beaniwa.com/en/index.html) - Agency overview and value proposition.
- [Services](https://beaniwa.com/en/services.html) - Full details on development, SEO, and marketing solutions.
- [Portfolio](https://beaniwa.com/en/portfolio.html) - Case studies including `mercadoregional.com.mx`, `forjanorte.com.mx`, and `alanquintana.pro`.
- [About](https://beaniwa.com/en/about.html) - History, mission, and team values.
- [Contact](https://beaniwa.com/en/contact.html) - Lead generation and inquiry form.

### Español (Secondary)
- [Inicio](https://beaniwa.com/es/index.html) - Resumen general de la agencia.
- [Servicios](https://beaniwa.com/es/servicios.html) - Detalle de soluciones digitales.
- [Portafolio](https://beaniwa.com/es/portafolio.html) - Proyectos destacados y casos de éxito.
- [Nosotros](https://beaniwa.com/es/nosotros.html) - Historia y filosofía de la agencia.
- [Contacto](https://beaniwa.com/es/contacto.html) - Formulario de contacto y canales de atención.
